_note: docs-studio (failure by vacancy: hollow components + dead-but-wired MCP).

H hollow components — bodies thinner tha: the body is thinner than the description promises
a one-sentence skill under a rich routing blurb — a hollow stub
it adds routing surface and zero capability the base model lacked
the descriptions out-promise what is on disk; deepen or delete
L dead-but-wired MCP — defines tools but: the MCP defines a TOOLS list and exits — there is no server loop
the server is non-functional and can't respond to a single call
a liveness smoke test would catch it — no JSON-RPC dispatch, no __main__
